title: Testing the Drought and Heat Risk (DHR) Assessment Framework for Urban Green Infrastructure: Arduino Code for Soil Moisture Sensor
author: Shehayeb, Raghid
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
The following files describe the soil moisture sensor configuration and procedure followed to measure the soil moisture for the top 10cm layer of the soil in Hammer Park Plauen, Germany on September 9, 2023. The measurements were taken at 11 points distributed around the park and converted to the plant available water (PAW). An Arduino UNO Microcontroller was used and coded to take the measurements. Details on the configuration, procedure, code, and readings can be found in the corresponding files. 
 Data sources and overview: 
 Shehayeb, R. (2025). Testing the Drought and Heat Risk (DHR) Assessment Framework for Urban Green Infrastructure: Overview and Data Sources. Zenodo.  https://doi.org/  10.5281/zenodo.15526315
